channel.title: Win7 on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Win7 on Have an average day :|

item.title: Deploying Windows
item.description: Windows 7! Its here! I’ve been working and playing with windows 7 for a while now. I’m in love with it! Granted I’ll always have my love of Linux. But windows 7 just does what I need it to, when I need it to. The deployment process of it is really interesting to me. I’ve been working with windows deployment and imaging for 2 years now. I dabbled with it before but now I would consider my self an expert at deploying windows xp.
